message:
Add comprehensive test beads for 15 new feature areas

Created 13 explicit test beads covering:
- Render Budget unit and property tests (bd-dez5)
- Terminal Capability Probing tests (bd-1po2)
- Time-Travel Debugging tests (bd-17kf)
- Input Macro Recording tests (bd-c6x0)
- Widget Introspection tests (bd-1awh)
- Smart Resize Debouncing tests (bd-3ivg)
- Session Recording Asciicast tests (bd-1fd9)
- Layout Constraint Debugger tests (bd-1u02)
- Composable Animation tests (bd-2nzx)
- Cross-Terminal Clipboard tests (bd-kkn1)
- Performance Tracing tests (bd-1195)
- Frame Caching tests (bd-2mlp)
- Headless Rendering Mode tests (bd-mevj)

Also added missing dependencies:
- bd-28jm -> bd-10i.8.1 (resize event handling)
- bd-3dca -> bd-2lwf (session recording extends time-travel)
- bd-9xbn -> bd-3ky.4 (constraint debugger requires layout solver)
- bd-2d2v -> bd-10i.4.4 (clipboard requires terminal capabilities)

Total beads: 246, no cycles, graph healthy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
